title: Hero's PS4 Edition Replication Modpack
description: This modpack aims to replicate the Minecraft experience on the PS4 before it was changed to Bedrock Edition.
body:
This modpack aims to replicate Minecraft:Playstation 4® Edition as much as humanly possible. For  1.20.4, This pack removes all 1.15+ Features! So no bees, piglins, glow squids, wardens (sadly), or breezes, then adds ps4 edition parity atop it, dlcs, the ui, even niche stuff like leashable boats, everything is back! With an optional legacy replicating terrain preset (creds to moderner beta and use the 1.17 one we took all new stuff out) Immersion has truly never been better! Old pigman designs, old vexes, old bats, old ui, you name it, it's here. 
Plans: -Limited world sizes 
-Non- PS4 settings from Legacy4j removed
-Removing Herobrine -DLC worlds and textures 
-Skin Changer 
-Minigames 
-Launch new Minecraft button that opens bugrock if installed 
-Replicate bugs on the latest version
-Other modpacks replicating other versions
-Decay arrows from fletchers 
-Old dungeon terrain generation
-Playstation 4® System style achievements
-Screenshots from users of the modpack's worlds 
-A discord server 
-Leaderboards
-Shrubs in Creative Inventory
Credits:
Permdog99 for Legacy Mipmaps,
HEROBRINEBOT for creating the modpack,
FR00TP3NCH for initial release on Modrinth, new logo, igloo bug help, advice for a name change to play online button, general cool person behavior.
